Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: completa pagamento senza FIC con status issued_stripe

Se Fatture in Cloud non è connesso o non ha IVA/metodo pagamento
configurati (isFicNotReadyError), il flusso di finalizzazione non
blocca più il pagamento. Il pagamento Stripe è già incassato, quindi
l'appuntamento viene marcato:

  invoiceStatus: "issued_stripe"
  paymentStatus:  "paid"

Il documento per l'allievo rimane disponibile tramite la ricevuta Stripe
(getMobileAppointmentPaymentDocument già ha questo fallback).

Fix anche alla query del CRON: gli appuntamenti issued_stripe con
invoiceId null vengono esclusi dal loop di riprocessamento tramite
  { invoiceId: null, invoiceStatus: { not: "issued_stripe" } }
così non vengono ri-tentati inutilmente.

Gli errori FIC reali (API error, token non recuperabile) continuano
ad andare in invoiceStatus "failed" con log in autoscuolaAppointmentPayment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
iOS: show inline video for direct long-press → Save Video

On iOS there's no web API to save to camera roll programmatically.
Instead, show completed videos inline with <video> element so user
can long-press → "Save Video" (1 step instead of 3).

- Detect iOS via user agent
- Skip auto file download on iOS, show inline video player instead
- Add ?inline=1 param to file API for proper MIME type + inline disposition
- Desktop behavior unchanged (auto file download)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplification de la veille technologique au niveau BTS

Remplacement des termes trop techniques (UEBA, SIEM/SOAR, EDR/XDR, LLM,
CRYSTALS-Kyber, CRYSTALS-Dilithium, SPHINCS+, FALCON, algorithmes de
Shor/Grover, réseaux euclidiens) par des explications accessibles en
français, tout en conservant les deux mêmes thèmes.

feat(scope): gate TeamPane on isOperational — 3-state model consistency

and MemorySidebar. /v3/team/* and /v3/user-chat/* are company-scoped
endpoints (Core 12a1edd); the frontend now matches.

path and the fetchTeamData + presence polling effects.

Add 5 use-case-specific multi-faith prototypes

Each prototype has shortened onboarding (only steps relevant to that feature),
lands directly on the feature post-onboarding, and adapts content for
Hindu and Muslim flows. Faith-neutral welcome messages — no Bhakti/Hindu
terminology before faith is selected.

- daily-ritual.html — Morning ritual / Fajr ibadat, 5-step onboarding
- live-darshan.html — Temple / Masjid live streams, 3-step onboarding
- puja-vidhi.html — Puja vidhi / Salah guide, 3-step onboarding
- festivals.html — Upcoming festivals / Islamic calendar, 2-step onboarding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Phase 1: Product Intelligence Database

Adds a self-improving product knowledge base to drive 95%+ recipe–deal
matching accuracy.

New files:
- backend/database/schema.sql — SQLite schema (products, aliases, match_history)
- backend/database/db.js — better-sqlite3 connection wrapper with CRUD helpers
- backend/services/productCategorizer.js — Claude Haiku categorization service
  (individual + batch), with keyword-based fallback for resilience
- backend/services/productLookup.js — 5-tier lookup (exact → alias → normalized
  → fuzzy/Levenshtein → barcode) with auto-alias creation on fuzzy matches
- backend/scripts/seedDatabase/seedOpenFoodFacts.js — seeds ~40K AU products
  from Open Food Facts JSON API (page-by-page, 500ms delay)
- backend/scripts/seedDatabase/seedWoolworths.js — seeds ~20K products via
  100 search terms against Woolworths API + Claude categorization
- backend/scripts/seedDatabase/seedColes.js — same for Coles API (~15K)
- backend/scripts/testProductLookup.js — hit-rate test against 42 sample deals
- backend/scripts/testCategorization.js — validates Claude categorization output

Updated:
- backend/services/dealService.js — enrichDealWithProduct() + enrichDealsWithProducts()
  integrate product intelligence into the deal refresh pipeline (Phase 3 background)
- .gitignore — products.db and OFF CSV excluded

commit.message:
feat(web-ui): default task list to active statuses

When navigating to /tasks with no status filter, only active statuses
are shown (pending, in_progress, pending_review, needs_work, blocked).
Completed and cancelled tasks are hidden unless the user explicitly
selects "All Statuses". The status dropdown now defaults to "Active"
instead of "All Statuses".

- Export ACTIVE_STATUSES constant from TaskFilters for reuse
- Support string[] status param in fetchTasks/filterTasks for multi-value filtering
- Add "Active" as default option and "All Statuses" as explicit option in status filter
- URL param status=all shows everything; no status param shows active only

Task: @01KKB66JH0KPXXAJ359JDWJZ0W
Spec: @web-dashboard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: address security and code review findings from pre-PR review

Security (CRITICAL):
- auth.module.ts: validate JWT_SECRET length ≥32 at startup — fails fast on bad config
- auth.service.ts: make refresh token rotation atomic via Prisma transaction + reuse detection
  (revoked token reuse now invalidates all user sessions)
- jwt.strategy.ts: select only {id, email, role} — exclude passwordHash from request.user
- jwt-auth.guard.ts: normalize all JWT errors (expired, invalid sig) to 401, never 500

Security (HIGH):
- api-football.client.ts: replace INCR+EXPIRE with INCR + EXPIRE NX (prevents immortal key bug)
- roles.guard.ts: add audit logging on access denial; log error if user absent on protected route
- admin.service.ts: catch P2025 on alias delete operations → 404 instead of 500

Correctness (HIGH):
- bootstrap.processor.ts: add per-league error isolation (one bad league no longer aborts all)
- bootstrap.processor.ts: paginate /players endpoint — fetch all pages, not just page 1
- bootstrap.processor.ts: fix round sorting to numeric (string sort scrambled GW10+ order)
- bootstrap.processor.ts: pass null (not undefined) for homeGoals/awayGoals in Prisma update

Quality (MEDIUM):
- auth.service.ts: catch P2002 on register() create → 409 instead of 500 under concurrency
- auth.service.ts: bind logout() to authenticated userId — users can only revoke their own tokens
- auth.controller.ts: pass CurrentUser id to logout service call
- admin.controller.ts: use DefaultValuePipe + ParseIntPipe on page/limit query params
- redis.service.ts: wrap quit() in try/catch during module destroy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove old monolithic files and clean up post-migration

Delete songs.js, game.js, app.js (content now lives in src/ modules).
Update tests.html to use ES module imports instead of script tags.
Update CLAUDE.md architecture docs to reflect new module structure.
Fix ESLint config: add fetch to Node globals, remove legacy section.
Update generate-songs.js to output songs-data.js with ES module format.

commit.message:
feat: add about and contact pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refonte du système de rangées - rangées indépendantes

Les rangées sont maintenant des entités indépendantes (GardenRow) sur
lesquelles on peut planter différentes espèces, au lieu d'être liées
à une seule plantation.

Changements:
- Ajout du type GardenRow avec géométrie et couleur configurable
- Ajout des champs rowId et positionOnRow dans Planting
- Nouvel outil "row" dans la toolbar pour dessiner des rangées
- Rendu SVG des rangées avec sélection et handles
- Panneau de propriétés pour les rangées avec "Remplir la rangée"
- Migration automatique des anciennes rangées au chargement
- Cascades de suppression (plot→rows, row→plantings)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix broken CID inline images in email views

- Fix .maybeSingle() failing for duplicate internet_message_ids across
  mailboxes by using .limit(1).single() in MODE 3 and MODE 4
- Add 401 token retry via fetchWithTokenRetry in MODE 3 (was missing)
- Add fallback download for large inline attachments (>4MB) without
  contentBytes via $value endpoint
- Pass unique message_id (DB UUID) through the pipeline for correct
  per-message CID resolution and caching

commit.message:
Fix map page blank rendering

- Fix main height from calc(100vh - 4rem) to 100vh — the element
  starts at viewport top with pt-16 padding for the fixed header,
  so subtracting 4rem again left insufficient space
- Add min-h-0 to flex-1 map wrapper so it can shrink properly
  in flexbox context (prevents zero-height absolute children)
- Use inline styles for map container positioning to avoid
  CSS class conflicts with MapLibre's forced position:relative

fix: disable FK enforcement during domain cascade delete

Cross-domain references (roles from other domains referencing nouns
in this domain) block deletion. Temporarily disable PRAGMA foreign_keys
and also delete roles by noun_id in addition to reading_id.

commands and `gateway.enabled` config key.

commit.message:
feat(extension): auto-start dashboard API server on activation

The web dashboard at immorterm.com/dashboard requires a local server
on port 3847 to access session data. Previously users had to manually
run `npx immorterm serve` — now the extension auto-starts it as a
detached process, matching the pattern used for the memory service.

Add configurable YAML variables: letterhead-width, letterhead-xshift,
letterhead-yshift, signature-width, signature-hshift. Include Emory logo
in repo for portability.

Type of Package dropdown with rate options, Ship Now pre-selects package

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Upload resolved 3rd-party images to backend for caching

When the frontend resolves fallback images from ARASAAC/OpenSymbols APIs,
upload the resolved PNG to the backend's cloud storage so future sessions
can use the cached image directly instead of repeating expensive API calls.

- Add uploadPictureFile multipart upload method to NetworkService
- Add maybeUploadImage to ImageLocatorService with auth guard, per-session
  dedup, 512KB size limit, destroy safety, and fire-and-forget error handling
- Switch option.gts to use getPictureForWordAsDataURL to route through
  canvas pipeline that triggers the upload
- Add MSW handler for POST /api/cloud/upload/picture
- Add 7 unit tests covering upload logic guards and edge cases

commit.message:
fix: supply chain tab — use industry-level screener queries instead of peer classification

The previous approach classified stock-peers (all same industry) as suppliers/customers
using heuristics, which always resulted in 0 suppliers and 0 customers. Now queries FMP
screener for companies in related industries using a comprehensive supply chain map
covering 65+ industries across all GICS sectors, with sector-level fallback.

Add hooks, submodule management, CLI tools, scan, and rename binary to crk

- Add git post-commit hook for automatic PRD detection with agent commit
  safety (RUSTY_REFINERY_SKIP_HOOK=1 on spawned processes)
- Add submodule discovery from parent repo .gitmodules (first-level only)
- Add submodule create/list commands with configurable repos_path,
  submodules_path, and optional github_account remote
- Add tools subcommand mirroring MCP tools for direct CLI invocation
- Add scan command to walk planning directory and sync all PRDs
- Add shell completions via clap_complete (bash, zsh, fish, etc.)
- Move all subcommand handlers to src/commands/ module directory
- Rename binary from rusty-refinery to crk
- Resolve target submodule from PRD subdirectory when launching agents

commit.message:
feat: implement Phase 1 foundation — monorepo, auth, prisma, api-football client, alias system

- Init pnpm workspaces monorepo with docker-compose (Postgres + Redis)
- packages/shared: scoring/league/game constants + TS types
- NestJS bootstrap: ConfigModule, PrismaService (global), RedisService (global)
- Full Prisma schema with all tables + blank-GW partial index in migration
- AuthModule: register/login/refresh/logout with bcryptjs + JWT (15m) + refresh tokens (7d, rotated)
- ApiFootballClient: Redis rate-limit counter (warn@80, throw@95) + 60min response cache
- SyncModule: BullMQ season-bootstrap queue + BootstrapProcessor seeding all 5 leagues
- AliasModule: AliasService.resolveClub/Player/Competition() — trademark firewall
- AdminModule: alias CRUD endpoints + sync trigger (POST /admin/sync/bootstrap)
- Global JwtAuthGuard + RolesGuard + @Public()/@Roles() decorators
- Update dev docs to reflect pnpm and bcryptjs choices

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add services pages with block renderer, pricing modes, inquiry form

Build the complete services feature including:
- BlockRenderer component mapping 12 block types to render components
- 11 block render components (HeroSection, RichText, Image, ImageGallery,
  Callout, Quote, StepGuide, FAQ, CTA, Table, Embed) plus inline divider
- Services list page with category filter tabs and service cards
- Service detail page with cover image, block content, features list
- PricingSection supporting fixed/addons/custom pricing modes
- InquiryForm for custom-quote services
- POST /api/inquiries endpoint creating records in Payload CMS
